response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, there is no evidence of recent or deep expertise in STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or secure embedded systems required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse tech stacks
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical education (workshops, talks)
Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ work in the last 9 years; core requirement not met
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) and IEC 62443 security standards
No evidence of designing scalable on-premises/cloud industrial automation platforms
